title: MusicalLib
description: Small library to make it easy to add new discs to the game.
body:
[![RubyHost Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734de55b9d68de8d0d141c95b975144be608660a_0.webp)](https://billing.rubyhost.net/aff.php?aff=22)

# **This Mod/Library helps you add discs to the game in a survivable way using the same system I used in ArtisticCraft but more advanced.**

**Also adds way to get all vanilla discs and adds multiple tags to help other mod creators use the same system as me.**

**Recorder:** Its a block used to record discs using sheets, just hold a blank disc and a sheet in your main-hand and off-hand and right click on a recorder to use

**Sheets:** Sheets always match their pattern with the corresponding disc, you can craft a specific one or a random sheet and right click with it on hand

**The way to obtain the discs is quite vanilla-friendly using sheets and empty disks in a recorder to obtain the disc corresponding to the sheet.**

**__I do not intend to downgrade the mod to versions prior to 1.19.4 or Fabric.__**
